message:
test(fnp-python): conformance_diff_gradient.rs harness for diff/gradient/ediff1d

12 oracle tests covering:
- diff: basic, n parameter, 2D axis, prepend/append, empty, single-element
- gradient: basic, custom spacing, empty-raises-ValueError
- ediff1d: basic, to_begin/to_end, empty

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
